runs.objective: Investigate BRCA1 and PARP inhibitor response.

cost_comparison.notes: Cost comparison is unavailable until both deterministic baseline and shadow planner telemetry are present.

workspace_summary.objective: Investigate BRCA1 and PARP inhibitor response.

objective_routing_hints.summary: Structured-source routing hints are recorded for later checkpoints and should not drive the current step selection yet.

context_only.summary: Initialize the durable workspace from request inputs.
Derive Round 2 driven terms from PubMed findings plus seed terms.
Review the current PDF workset as existing user-supplied evidence.
Review the current text workset as existing user-supplied evidence.
Load MONDO grounding context as a deferred ontology step.

live.summary: Run deterministic PubMed discovery queries.
Ingest selected PubMed documents and extract evidence-backed proposals.
Run deterministic structured enrichment for one enabled source.
Queue and execute governed research bootstrap as a child run.
Run one deterministic chase round over newly created entities.
Generate and store the final research brief.
Escalate a blocked or risky run to a human operator.
Record the terminal stop reason for the orchestrator run.

reserved.summary: Reserve an explicit UniProt grounding action for later phases.
Reserve an explicit HGNC grounding action for later phases.
Reserve a graph-connection action for later planner-led phases.
Reserve a hypothesis-generation action for later planner-led phases.
Reserve a graph-search action for later planner-led phases.
Reserve a disconfirming-evidence search action for later phases.

prior_decisions.evidence_basis: Deterministic Phase 1 baseline will run PubMed discovery before structured enrichment.
Deterministic Phase 1 baseline will ingest selected PubMed records and extract proposals.
Driven terms are deterministically derived after the PubMed-backed phase.
Structured enrichment for enabled sources follows the deterministic source handlers.
Structured enrichment for enabled sources follows the deterministic source handlers.
Structured enrichment for enabled sources follows the deterministic source handlers.
The deterministic baseline queues governed bootstrap after source enrichment.
The deterministic baseline can execute up to two chase rounds using existing thresholds.
The deterministic baseline can execute up to two chase rounds using existing thresholds.
The deterministic baseline ends by generating and storing the research brief.

synthesis_readiness.summary: Another bounded retrieval step still has qualitative value because grounded evidence is still limited; structured sources remain pending (clinvar, drugbank, alphafold).
